---
title: "Group 9 Project"
number-sections: true
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
theme: flatly
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(sjPlot)
library(performance)
library(kableExtra)
#this is the name given to the .csv file. If anyone is making plots, use data=DAProject9
DAProject9 <- read.csv("DAProject9.csv")
```


# Introduction {#sec-intro}

The *2008 - 2012 Scottish Health Survey* provides key insight into the health trends of Scottish residents. In this report, we we focus on the prevalence of **obesity** over time, as well as its relationship with selected lifestyle factors. The explanatory variables considered are `Year`, `AgeGroup`, `Sex` and `Employment`. `BMIgroup` is a categorical variable representing an individual's **weight classification group**, including **obesity**.

# Exploratory Data Analysis {#sec-eda}

# Formal Data Analysis {#sec-fda}

# Conclusions {#sec-conc}
